name: Gingerbread Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream the shortening and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Stir in the molasses, then add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Dissolve the baking soda in a separate cup with the buttermilk.
4. In a separate bowl, combine the flour with the spices (ginger, cinnamon, cloves). Add this mixture to the creamed mixture alternately with the buttermilk, stirring gently after each addition.
5. Stir in the pecans and raisins.
6. Transfer the batter to an airtight container and refrigerate until ready to use.
7. When ready to bake, fill greased muffin cups about 2/3 full.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 20 minutes, or until done. If baking unchilled, reduce the baking time to approximately 15 minutes.
9. The batter can be stored in the refrigerator for several weeks. Makes about 6 dozen muffins.
